inline_comments.message:
The code that is already merged in gerrit has query written as - graph.traversal().V().has(SCHEMA_INITIALIZED).next(), but we observed when cluster had large amount of data, the indexes are not utilized properly.
One has to provide key and value in 'has' to make use of composite indexes. This I tested through gremlin console also, 

graph.traversal().V().has(SCHEMA_INITIALIZED,true).next() works very fast as compared to graph.traversal().V().has(SCHEMA_INITIALIZED) which takes very long time.

Please suggest!
Committed some changes after refactoring. Plz check
